channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: KPSEA 2026 Exam Timetable and Guidelines for Grade 6 Pupils
item.description: The Kenya National Examination Council (KNEC) has released the KPSEA timetable for the 2026 exams for Grade 6 pupils, marking the end of their primary education. The exams will start with rehearsals o...

item.title: Albanese Government Stalls FOI Requests While Negotiating Data Access for Trump Administration
item.description: The Albanese government has refused to acknowledge ongoing negotiations with the Trump administration regarding access to Australians' biometric and identity document data. Despite multiple inquiries ...

item.title: Maritime Traffic Remains Severely Restricted in Strait of Hormuz After Ceasefire
item.description: Since the two-week ceasefire in the Middle East was announced, only 10 vessels have passed through the Strait of Hormuz, a key maritime corridor linking the Gulf to the Indian Ocean. Maritime data sho...

item.title: Construction Begins on Montreal Port Expansion Project to Boost Trade and Capacity
item.description: Construction has officially begun on a major expansion of the Port of Montreal, located in Contrecœur, Quebec. This expansion, dubbed the first 'nation-building' project fast-tracked for approval by t...

item.title: South African Golfers Battle Tough Conditions in First Round of Masters Tournament
item.description: The opening round of the 2026 Masters Tournament at Augusta National saw a disappointing performance from South African competitors, all finishing above par on a challenging course. Charl Schwartzel, ...

item.title: Aston Villa Beat Bologna as Nottingham Forest Draw with Porto in Europa League Quarterfinals
item.description: Omo, e be like say Aston Villa dey sharply go Europa League semi-finals as Ollie Watkins score two goals make dem beat Bologna 3-1 for first leg of quarter-final. The Villa coach, Unai Emery, dey gung...

item.title: New Research Reveals Forgotten Stories of Women’s Resistance and Suffering at Treblinka
item.description: A new historical study sheds light on the overlooked experiences and resistance of Jewish women imprisoned at the Treblinka extermination camp during the Holocaust. The research revisits survivor test...

item.title: Trump Issues 48-Hour Deadline to Iran Amid Ongoing Search for Downed US Pilot
item.description: United States President Donald Trump has issued a firm warning to Iran, giving Tehran 48 hours to 'make a deal or open up the Strait of Hormuz'. This comes as both Iranian and US forces are actively s...

item.title: Investigation Underway on Alleged Hazing Incident at PNPA
item.description: Authorities have launched an investigation into a suspected hazing incident at the Philippine National Police Academy (PNPA), involving multiple cadets. The National Police Commission (NAPOLCOM) forme...

item.title: Lions and Beyers Swanepoel part ways after disciplinary issues
item.description: The Central Gauteng Lions have officially ended their relationship with all-rounder Beyers Swanepoel, following a controversial incident during the recent One-Day Cup final against the Titans. Swanepo...

item.title: Child Fatality Following Dog Attack in Redcar
item.description: Tragedy has struck in Redcar following the death of a child after a suspected dog attack. Police are currently investigating the circumstances surrounding the incident, which occurred earlier today. W...

item.title: The contrasting political approaches of Taylor and Canavan highlight problems for Taylor
item.description: The article explores the stark differences between Liberal leader Angus Taylor and Nationals leader Matt Canavan, especially in their responses to US President Donald Trump's inflammatory language. Ta...

item.title: Couple Welcomes Quadruplets, All Girls, and Seeks Community Support
item.description: Adriana Luna and her fiancé Anthony Lerma from Corpus Christi are overjoyed after welcoming quadruplets, bringing their total number of children to five. The pregnancy came as a complete surprise as A...

item.title: Judge to Decide on Evidence Handling and Credibility in Frank Stronach Sexual Assault Trial
item.description: The sexual assault trial of auto parts magnate Frank Stronach, aged 93, is now in the hands of Justice Anne Molloy of the Superior Court of Ontario. The case involves allegations that Stronach sexuall...

item.title: Abaxx Technologies Stock Sees Rally, Prompting Director Purchases
item.description: Shares of Abaxx Technologies Inc. (ABXXF) have experienced a notable rebound, climbing roughly 50 per cent since March 23rd, spurred by the company’s announcement of record weekly trading volume. This...

item.title: Rescue operation underway after 2-year-old boy falls into borewell in Ujjain
item.description: A 2-year-old boy in Ujjain, Madhya Pradesh, has fallen into a borewell, triggering a swift rescue operation. The incident occurred in the early hours, and rescue teams from multiple agencies are worki...

item.title: Comelec releases guidelines and calendar for the 2026 BARMM parliamentary elections
item.description: The Commission on Elections (Comelec) has officially released the election calendar and list of prohibited acts for the 2026 Bangsamoro Autonomous Region in Muslim Mindanao (BARMM) parliamentary polls...

item.title: Melania Trump denies any ties to Jeffrey Epstein and calls for public hearings for victims
item.description: First Lady Melania Trump made a rare public appearance at the White House to firmly reject claims linking her to Jeffrey Epstein. In an unexpected on-camera statement, she said the “lies” connecting h...

item.title: Kwara community beg government as bandits hold eight church members for ransom of ₦150 million
item.description: For Omugo community wey dey inside Oro Ago District of Ifelodun Local Government Area for Kwara State, tension still high as bandits never release the eight church members wey dem kidnap on March 22, ...

item.title: Kenya Meteorological Department Issues Weather Forecast Predicting Rainfall and Strong Winds Across Regions
item.description: The Kenya Meteorological Department (KMD) has released its latest 24-hour weather forecast covering different regions across the country. The report shows that areas in the Highlands east and west of ...
